roptuna: Hyperparameter Optimization Using the Optuna Framework

Source: R/roptuna-package.R
roptuna-package.Rd

An R implementation of the Optuna hyperparameter optimization framework. Provides define-by-run search spaces, TPE sampling, trial pruning, and persistent study storage via SQLite.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://kvenkita.github.io/roptuna

  • https://github.com/kvenkita/roptuna

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/kvenkita/roptuna/issues
